channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: New report reveals Australia’s most reliable NBN providers – is yours on the list?
item.description: A recent Opensignal report has found which of Australia's biggest internet providers delivers the most reliable and stable connection at home.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: NYT Strands today — hints, answers and spangram for Thursday, October 17 (game #228)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.
item.dc:creator: marc.mclaren@futurenet.com (Marc McLaren), TechRadar

item.title: Big Tech turns to nuclear energy to power AI boom
item.description: Major technology companies are increasingly turning to nuclear energy as they attempt to keep up with the vast energy demands of artificial intelligence (AI) without derailing their highly publicized environmental goals.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Capital One has a new tool to help keep track of all your subscriptions
item.description: Capital One launched on Wednesday a free, integrated subscription management tool, allowing customers to track, block, and cancel recurring payments from over 10,000 merchants directly through its mobile app.
item.dc:creator: Janya Sundar, Fast Company

item.title: EVs have a ‘Republican problem’ with divide deepening ahead of election
item.description: Even a recent influx of appearances from Tesla Inc.’s Elon Musk alongside Trump hasn’t helped reverse decades of derision against plug-in vehicles and the former president’s pledge to end Joe Biden’s EV policies on “day one.
item.dc:creator: Tribune News Service, The Mercury News

item.title: FTC announces rule to make it easier to cancel subscriptions
item.description: The Federal Trade Commission is taking steps to make it easier for consumers to cancel digital subscriptions.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: SpaceX blasts past 100 launches in 2024 with 101st from California
item.description: The aerospace titan does a lot of heavy lifting — and it's hard to believe that the aerospace giant has already launched more that 100 rockets this year alone.
item.dc:creator: Los Angeles Daily News, The Mercury News

item.title: Elon Musk unveils Tesla's Robovan, Robotaxi, humanoid robots
item.description: Tesla's "We, Robot" event reveals the Robovan, Robotaxi and the Optimus humanoid robot. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson examines the company's latest innovations in autonomous technology.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cómo gestionar los programas de IA generativa: gobernanza, educación, regulación
item.description: La inteligencia artificial (IA) generativa ha crecido con gran rapidez, atrayendo inversiones y despertando el interés y la creatividad de los desarrolladores. Las empresas ven en la IA generativa una vía para crear servicios innovadores y revolucionar sus sectores.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft settles video gamers' lawsuit over Activision takeover
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Microsoft Corp. has settled a lawsuit from a group of gamers who sued to try to stop the company from buying video game publisher Activision Blizzard for $69 billion last year. Terms of the settlement were not disclosed.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Missed out on the northern lights? Scientists expect more solar storms to produce auroras
item.description: Space weather experts say expect to see more northern lights in unusual places as the sun continues to sizzle.
item.dc:creator: Adithi Ramakrishnan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: When it comes to innovation and the technology to drive it, few companies today rival Nvidia. The company has leveraged its GPU expertise to become a dominant player in the AI market. Nvidia’s GPU pedigree dates back decades to high-powered processors originally built for gaming systems.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to transform scientific discoveries into better treatments
item.description: As I reflect on how we can more effectively bring treatments to patients, one central question emerges: How can we transform scientific discoveries into better treatments? The intersection of science and innovation is rapidly evolving, yet translating cutting-edge research into impactful therapies r
item.dc:creator: Guadalupe Hayes-Mota, Fast Company

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cato Networks extends SASE platform with digital experience monitoring
item.description: Cato Networks today introduced digital experience monitoring (DEM) capabilities that will augment the company’s cloud SASE platform with application traffic and network performance data that IT operations teams need to optimize end-user experiences.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Hide and lock your apps on your iPhone with iOS 18
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson explores the iOS 18’s new features to hide and lock apps for better privacy and organization.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Murder trial of Nima Momeni in death of Cash App founder Bob Lee begins
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The murder trial of a tech consultant in the stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee begins Monday, a year and a half after the widely admired entrepreneur was found staggering on a deserted downtown San Francisco street seeking help.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Volunteers bring solar power to Hurricane Helene's disaster zone
item.description: BAKERSVILLE, N.C. (AP) — Nearly two weeks after Hurricane Helene downed power lines and washed out roads all over North Carolina's mountains, the constant din of a gas-powered generator is getting to be too much for Bobby Renfro.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA AOUN ANGUEIRA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: This 3D-printed Texas hotel is shaking up the construction industry
item.description: The Vulcan is Icon's massive 3D printer, which stands 15½ feet tall and weighs 4.75 tons. It's capable of creating buildings with 12-foot-high curving walls.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Will your AI bot put citizens at risk?
item.description: Government agencies have an obligation to provide accurate information to citizens, and a bad bot can have both legal and moral implications. The post Will your AI bot put citizens at risk? first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: DoT driving IT modernization to meet enterprise, local needs
item.description: Cordell Schachter, the Transportation Department CIO, said the agency’s DevSecOps capabilities are maturing as part of its digital transformation effort. The post DoT driving IT modernization to meet enterprise, local needs first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: AMD unveils new generation of Epyc, Instinct chips
item.description: AMD announced its latest AI and high-performance computing processors at its Advancing AI event in San Francisco, including the fifth generation of its Epyc server processors and AMD Instinct MI325X accelerators.
item.dc:creator: Network World
